sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109619" key="u(po/yaros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόψᾱρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat dappled,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἵπποι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1866.tlg001:52J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52J.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
